scene_input.scene_summary: The Evil One appears to a young boy, trying to make him feel unhappy with his life.
scene_input.key_visual_action: The Evil One whispering in the boy's ear

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 375
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of resisting Shaytan's whispers and staying on the right path

characters.name: The Evil One
characters.appearance: tall, lean build, dark clothing, hood up, face obscured by shadows

characters.name: Young Boy
characters.appearance: slender build, young, wearing a plain white thobe, khimar covering his hair, looking worried and scared

schema_output.narrative_text: A young boy walked alone in a dark alleyway, unaware of the danger lurking nearby. Suddenly, a tall figure appeared before him, whispering lies in his ear.

compliance.notes: The scene is set in pre-prophetic era, so there are no prophets present.

schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A dimly lit, narrow 7th century Makkah alleyway with rough, unpainted mud-brick walls in dark earth tones and a dusty, packed-earth floor. Late evening shadows stretch across the alley, with a faint moonlight visible above. In the center of the scene, a young woman stands with a worried expression, looking up at a tall, dark figure looming over her. The central figure is seen from behind, wearing a dark cloak with a hood up, casting a long shadow on the wall. The woman's hand is placed on her ear, as if trying to block out the whispers. A small, flickering oil lamp hangs from a nearby wooden beam, casting eerie shadows. Medium wide shot at waist level. Dark, muted palette with touches of warm golden light, creating an ominous and foreboding mood. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
